variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16299 Air Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAO 56137
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter SA 16299 Air Filter is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAO 56137. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16299 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
